entry_exit.entry: Buy when insider buying threshold is met (large insider buy transaction).
entry_exit.exit: Sell when insider selling threshold is met (large insider sell transaction).

trigger.description: Monitor SEC filings for insider buy/sell transactions. Identify large transactions over $100,000 by C-level executives or directors. Generate buy signal when insiders are buying, sell signal when insiders are selling.

position_sizing.method: Size positions based on transaction size and confidence in signal. Larger transactions by senior insiders warrant larger position sizes.
